description: Aggregated AI accuracy metrics from team leader ticket feedback. Populated by WF7. Retention: Indefinite.

columns.name: date
columns.note: Date this accuracy batch was processed (YYYY-MM-DD)

columns.name: total_reviewed
columns.note: Total tickets reviewed in this batch

columns.name: agreed
columns.note: Tickets where team leader marked Agree

columns.name: disagreed
columns.note: Tickets where team leader marked Disagree (false positives)

columns.name: worst_category
columns.note: Issue category with highest disagreement rate

columns.name: language
columns.note: Language scope: 'all' for global accuracy row, ISO 639-1 code for per-language rows (ar, de, el, en, fi, fr, it, no, pt)

notes: Multiple rows per date possible (WF7 runs every 6 hours)
